verses.toki: pilin sina li ike tawa mi.
jan seme li kama e ni: pali li kama pona?
verses.eng: Who's going to make sure that things are going to get done the way that they should?

verses.toki: lipu tenpo li lon seme?
sina pini ala pini e pali mi?
verses.eng: Are you going to fire me?

verses.toki: sina soweli pona.
sina o pali e ni lon tenpo sin ala.
verses.eng: You should never have to do that again.

verses.toki: mi ken ala pali e ijo ante.
verses.eng: I don't have any other options.

verses.toki: o tan insa ona e ale.
sona ike li kama.
jan li akesi.
sina ken ala ken alasa e sike musi kepeken luka wan?
verses.eng: Can you catch a ball with one hand?

verses.toki: o pana e ken ni: mi kama sin lon sewi ni.
mi wile tawa poka sina. taso mi ken ala.
verses.eng: I'd like to go with you, but I can't.

verses.toki: sina pana e ijo la pona li kama tawa jan.
verses.eng: Every time you donate you bless someone.

verses.toki: ona li jan pali pi pana sona. ona li pali e pali tan jan pali ante.
mi sona e ni: suwi li ike tawa sina.
verses.eng: I know you don't like chocolate.

verses.toki: sina lon ala sin tan seme?
ona li wile ala moli.

la.definition: seperator between context phrase and sentence

pi.definition: separator to connect noun phrases with 'of'
